name: Vigo
description_short: Western Union is a global money transfer service enabling customers to send and receive funds internationally with competitive exchange rates and low fees starting at $0.
description_long:
Western Union is a multinational financial services company that specializes in money transfer and payment services. The company operates a vast global network allowing customers to send money online and receive funds across numerous countries and territories worldwide. With operations spanning over 200 countries and territories, Western Union has established itself as a prominent player in the international remittance and money transfer industry. The company serves both individual consumers sending personal funds and businesses requiring payment solutions.

Western Union's primary service is international money transfers, enabling users to send funds from the United States to recipients in destinations including Mexico, Guatemala, the Philippines, India, Colombia, and numerous other countries. The platform offers competitive exchange rates that vary by destination, with rates for USD conversions ranging from approximately 16.95 to 17.63 MXN depending on the transfer method. The company provides multiple fee structures, ranging from $1.99 to $0.00 USD, with promotional offers for new registered users who receive a $0 fee on their first online transfer. Customers can register online to access better exchange rates and lower fees compared to unregistered users.

Western Union distinguishes itself through its extensive global reach and multi-currency support across major destinations and currencies. The company offers both registered and unregistered transfer options, with incentives for account creation. The platform provides real-time exchange rate quotes and transparent fee disclosure, allowing customers to see exactly what their recipient will receive before completing a transfer. Their integration of online transfer capabilities with physical locations provides flexibility for customers preferring different transfer methods.

Western Union's service carries standard limitations inherent to international money transfers, including currency conversion costs and exchange rate fluctuations. The website content indicates occasional service interruptions (as evidenced by the temporary Orange wallet unavailability notice). Customers should be aware that while promotional rates are available, standard transfer fees and exchange margins apply to most transactions, and the actual cost of sending money varies significantly by destination country and amount transferred.
pros: Extensive global network spanning over 200 countries and territories with support for major currencies
Competitive exchange rates with transparent real-time quotes before transfer completion
Low promotional fees with $0 charges available on first online transfer for registered users
Multiple transfer options including online and physical location-based transfers
Incentives for account registration including better exchange rates
Clear fee transparency showing exact amounts sent and received
Support for high-volume transfers with flexible sending amounts
cons: Service interruptions occur (Orange wallet was temporarily unavailable at time of content capture)
Exchange rates vary significantly by destination, creating pricing uncertainty
Standard fees and exchange margins apply to most transactions despite promotional offers
Online registration required to access best rates, creating friction for one-time users
Limited detail provided on transfer speed and processing times
best_for: International remittance senders supporting family members abroad
Frequent travelers needing to send money across multiple countries
Immigrants and expats sending regular payments to home countries
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers needing reliable, global money transfer capabilities with competitive rates and extensive destination coverage. The main caveat is that while promotional rates exist, standard fees and exchange margins apply to most transactions, and customers should compare rates for their specific destination before sending.
services: Online international money transfers from the United States
Multi-currency conversion with real-time exchange rates
Money transfer to Mexico with MXN currency support
Money transfer to Guatemala with GTQ currency support
Money transfer to the Philippines with PHP and USD support
Money transfer to India with INR currency support
Money transfer to Colombia with COP currency support
Money transfer to Dominican Republic with USD and DOP support
User account registration with promotional rate benefits
Wire transfer services across 200+ countries and territories
Exchange rate quoting and comparison tools
Fee-free transfer promotions for new registered customers
